sanskrit:
यदृच्छालाभसन्तुष्टो द्वन्द्वातीतो विमत्सरः।
समः सिद्धावसिद्धौ च कृत्वापि न निबध्यते॥
transliteration: yadṛcchā-lābha-santuṣṭo dvandvātīto vimatsaraḥ / samaḥ siddhāv asiddhau ca kṛtvāpi na nibadhyate
literal_meaning: One who is content with whatever comes on its own, who has transcended the pairs-of-opposites and is free from envy, who remains balanced in success and failure, is not bound even while acting.
contextual_meaning: A psychologically mature actor neither clings to favorable outcomes nor resists unfavorable ones; by relinquishing comparative judgment and affective volatility, action leaves no karmic imprint on the self-schema.
psychological_state: Flow-like autonomy: actions are intrinsically motivated, ego-involvement is minimal, and locus of control is internal yet detached from outcome.
trigger_scenario: You post creative work online—some pieces go viral, others are ignored. Instead of refreshing metrics, you close the app, take a breath, and begin the next project with the same enthusiasm.
anchor_text: Stay calm in gain and loss, act without craving or comparison.
